## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with the base branch (typically `main`)
- [ ] **Not committing directly to `main`** — changes are on a feature branch
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private env values in code or docs
- [ ] PR is reasonably scoped and reviewable
- [ ] Called out migrations, env var changes, or rollout steps in the description (if any)
